User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block programmatic/templated sections — thin auto-generated pages
# These are accessible via internal links but not intended for search indexing
Disallow: /mortgage/
Disallow: /bmi/
Disallow: /loan/
Disallow: /savings/
Disallow: /down-payment/
# /calorie/ — re-enabled (55 pages, 1400 words, 55% unique, 214 impressions)
# /currency/ — re-enabled (54 pages, 1300 words, 40% unique, 719 impressions)
Disallow: /paycheck/
Disallow: /macro/
Disallow: /data-convert/
Disallow: /pace/
Disallow: /due-date/
Disallow: /math/
Disallow: /percentage/
Disallow: /cooking/
Disallow: /compound-interest/
Disallow: /convert/
Disallow: /salary/
Disallow: /days-until/
Disallow: /days-ago/
Disallow: /days-from-now/
Disallow: /zodiac/
Disallow: /angel-number/
Disallow: /grade/
Disallow: /percent-off/
Disallow: /fraction/
Disallow: /roman-numerals/
Disallow: /number-to-words/
Disallow: /what-percent/
Disallow: /auto-loan/
Disallow: /decimal-to-fraction/
Disallow: /times-tables/
Disallow: /factors-of/
Disallow: /time-convert/
Disallow: /tip/
Disallow: /temperature/
Disallow: /born-in/
Disallow: /time-zone/
Disallow: /how-many/
Disallow: /random/

# Block thin game pages from indexing
Disallow: /test/2048-game/
Disallow: /test/snake-game/
Disallow: /test/minesweeper/
Disallow: /test/wordle-game/
Disallow: /test/sudoku/

# Block crawling of query strings
Disallow: /*?*

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://toolcalcs.com/sitemap-index.xml

# Crawl-delay for SEO crawlers
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: MJ12bot
Crawl-delay: 10

# Block known aggressive/unwanted bots
User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: PetalBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MegaIndex.ru
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /
